description_long: This is an old, weathered gravestone made of stone, standing upright on a rectangular patch of earth or gravel. The headstone features a rounded, ornate top with carved decorative motifs and a central shield-like emblem on the front face, surrounded by intricate scrollwork. The surface is mottled with patches of lichen, moss, and discoloration, indicating significant age and exposure to the elements. The back of the gravestone is plainer, with less visible ornamentation and more pronounced weathering and staining. The base of the stone is partially embedded in the ground, with some soil and gravel built up around it. The overall appearance suggests it is a traditional grave marker commonly found in historic cemeteries or graveyards.
description: A weathered, ornate stone gravestone with decorative carvings and a shield motif, set on a patch of earth and covered in lichen and moss.
description_view_0: The back and side of the gravestone, showing heavy weathering, discoloration, and a mostly plain surface with some decorative edging visible at the top.
description_view_1: The front of the gravestone, featuring detailed carvings, a central shield motif, and ornate scrollwork, with visible moss and lichen.
description_view_2: A side angle highlighting the thickness of the stone and the continuation of the decorative motifs from the front to the side.
description_view_3: A rear view showing the plain, heavily weathered back surface, with the ornate top edge and some moss growth.
